scenario: school-specific meaning is genuinely distinct from generic technical meaning
why: This preserves distinct ontology without flattening it into the generic technical layer.
why_this_is_not_just_menu_flatness: It distinguishes hierarchy from flat peerhood.

scenario: school-specific meaning is only a school attribution of the same technical meaning
why: Not every named school mention changes definition identity.
why_this_is_not_just_menu_flatness: It resists over-fragmentation while preserving attribution.

scenario: school-specific layer is a narrower branch or sub-opinion within technical meaning
why: Matches the owner’s deeper tree logic better than a flat third peer.
why_this_is_not_just_menu_flatness: The structure is hierarchical, not three flat bins.

scenario: forced questionnaire menu suggests three flat peers
why: C is the closest owner-faithful answer without pretending the menu is well-shaped.
why_this_is_not_just_menu_flatness: The caveat preserves the real structure.
